pricing.title: Plans & Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Free Scorecards for any Chicago parcel. A $25 feasibility report when you need the full picture. Pro for unlimited reports and discovery.
pricing.scorecardHint: Open any parcel's free Scorecard, then buy its full report.
pricing.proMath: 4 reports ≈ a month of Pro — go unlimited.
pricing.billingNote: Reports are one-time purchases. Pro subscriptions are billed monthly via Stripe. Cancel anytime.
reportFeatures: AI zoning analysis with cited code sections
A deliverable you can hand to a lender or client

scorecard.title: Property Scorecard
scorecard.subtitle: Free instant snapshot of any Chicago parcel — zoning, taxes, incentives, comps. Enter an address.
scorecard.addressNotFound: Could not find that address. Try a different format (e.g., "1601 N Milwaukee Ave").
scorecard.locationNotFound: Could not load property data for this location.

codeRedirect.title: That looks like a code question, not an address.
codeRedirect.body: The analyst can answer it — it reads Chicago's municipal code and cites the specific sections.
codeRedirect.orAskAnalyst: Not an address? Ask the analyst instead →

reportCTA.title: Development Feasibility Report
reportCTA.description: Professional PDF with AI-powered analysis for this property.
features: Buildable envelope & setbacks for this lot
reportCTA.boundary: The free Scorecard shows the public zoning table — the report computes this parcel's buildable envelope, tax projection, and approval pathway.

scorecard.nearestParcelCaveat: We couldn't confirm the exact tax parcel for this address, so the property, tax, and comparable-sales figures below describe the nearest parcel — which may be a neighbor. Verify the PIN before relying on parcel-specific numbers.

reason.capacity: FAR {{allowed}} allowed vs ≈{{existing}} built — room for ~{{ratio}}× more buildable area
reason.vacant: Effectively vacant on a buildable site (FAR {{allowed}} allowed)
reason.oz: In a federal Opportunity Zone — capital-gains deferral on reinvested gains
reason.ez: In an Illinois Enterprise Zone — sales-tax and fee relief
reason.distressIncentive: In a QCT/NMTC tract — eligible for distressed-area tax credits
reason.tod: TOD-eligible — reduced parking minimums and a density bonus
reason.landmark: Landmark designation — expect design review (adds time and cost)
reason.historic: Historic district — exterior changes are reviewed
reason.flood: FEMA flood zone {{zone}} — flood-resistant construction and insurance
reason.lakefront: Lakefront Protection district — additional review applies
reason.pdOverlay: Planned Development — entitlements governed by the PD ordinance
reason.aro: Affordable Requirements Ordinance applies to projects of 10+ units
reason.nearCapacity: Built at or near the as-of-right limit — little added capacity
reason.compsPointer: See recent comparable sales for the value range
reason.entitlement: {{name}} — entitlements set by the Planned Development ordinance, not as-of-right rules
reason.insufficient: Parcel identity couldn't be confirmed from the address

caveat.unverified: Parcel identity unconfirmed — property and comps figures may be a neighboring parcel. Verify the PIN before relying on them.
caveat.noBldgArea: Building area unavailable — development capacity wasn't computed for this parcel.
caveat.fallbackZone: Zoning shown is a category default, not a parcel-specific lookup.

strong.label: Ask the analyst: what's the binding constraint?
strong.question: What's the binding constraint on {{addr}} — FAR, height, or lot coverage?

incentive.label: Look into the incentive funding
incentive.tifQuestion: How much TIF funding is available in {{name}} and what projects qualify?
incentive.question: What tax incentives and grant programs are available at {{addr}}?

constrained.label: Ask the analyst about the constraint
constrained.landmarkQuestion: What does landmark / historic review require for a project at {{addr}}?
constrained.floodQuestion: What do the flood-zone requirements mean for development at {{addr}}?
constrained.pdQuestion: What does the Planned Development at {{addr}} permit?
constrained.overlayQuestion: What development restrictions apply from the overlays at {{addr}}?

entitlement.label: Ask what this PD permits
entitlement.question: What does the {{name}} Planned Development permit at {{addr}}?

verdict.howScoredNote: Deterministic from published zoning, incentive, and overlay data — no estimate or model. Verify against the cards above.

badges.exactTitle: Resolved to this exact Cook County tax parcel. Figures below are parcel-specific where available.
badges.unconfirmed: Area data — exact parcel not confirmed
badges.unconfirmedTitle: We couldn't confirm the exact tax parcel for this address right now (county parcel service). Figures below describe this location and the surrounding area.
badges.approximateTitle: This address was placed by street geocoding, so the parcel shown may be a close neighbor. Verify parcel-specific figures before relying on them.

scorecard.crimeAreaScope: Across {{area}} · last 90 days — not this parcel

violations.title: Building violations
violations.noneOnRecord: No violations on record at this address

scorecard.mapExpandNote: The pin marks the resolved location — verify it's the right lot.

sections.capacitySub: Zoning envelope and the overlay layers that shape it
sections.economicsSub: Assessment, taxes, comparable sales, and incentive money
sections.riskSub: Violations, complaints, and environmental flags at this address

discovery.teaserUnlock: Unlock the full ranked list, the upside map, refine, and export — Pro, $99/mo.
discovery.askAnalystArea: Ask the analyst about this area
discovery.orAskAnalystArea: Or ask the analyst about this area — free
discovery.seamPromptArea: I'm researching {{crit}} in {{area}}. What's driving development there, and what should I know before pursuing these properties?
discovery.seamPromptCity: I'm researching {{crit}} across Chicago. What should I know before pursuing these properties?
discovery.title: Property Discovery
discovery.subtitle: Start with a goal or describe what you're looking for — then refine.
discovery.searchPlaceholder: Describe what you want — e.g. "vacant multifamily near the L, built after 1990"
discovery.noMatchesTitle: No parcels match this recipe in the indexed area yet.
discovery.coverageNone: Discovery is being prepared — no parcels are indexed yet. Results will appear once the index is built.
discovery.coveragePartial: Indexed area: {{areas}}. More neighborhoods are being added — results are limited to live areas.
discovery.mapTruncated: Mapping {{shown}} of {{total}} — refine to map the rest.
discovery.setFilters: Set filters and run a search.
discovery.broadSearch: Broad search — add filters to narrow.
discovery.zeroNullBacked_one: No matches — the {{labels}} filter has no data in this dataset yet.
discovery.zeroNullBacked_other: No matches — the {{labels}} filters have no data in this dataset yet.
discovery.zeroNonLive_one: No matches — {{names}} isn't indexed yet. Indexed area: {{live}}.
discovery.zeroNonLive_other: No matches — {{names}} aren't indexed yet. Indexed area: {{live}}.
discovery.comingSoon: Coming with the next data update

vacant_mf_transit.label: Vacant land, MF-zoned, near transit
vacant_mf_transit.description: Empty lots in RM/RT multifamily zoning within ½ mile of an L stop.

teardown.label: Teardown candidates
teardown.description: Buildings worth far less than their land — classic land plays.

undervalued_mf.label: Undervalued multifamily
undervalued_mf.description: 2–6 flats in the bottom quartile of $/sq ft for their neighborhood.

underused_commercial_tif.label: Underused commercial in a TIF
underused_commercial_tif.description: Cheapest under-built commercial parcels inside a TIF district.

fresh_comps.label: Fresh comps (sold < 6 mo)
fresh_comps.description: Recent multifamily & commercial sales for underwriting.

adu_2flats.label: ADU-eligible 2–4 flats
adu_2flats.description: Small multifamily on ADU-eligible blocks — add a coach house.

settings.title: Settings
settings.freeBlurb: Pay per report — no subscription. Pro adds unlimited reports and Discovery.
settings.proBlurb: Billed monthly via Stripe. Manage or cancel anytime.
settings.purchasesEmptyCta: Open a parcel's Scorecard to buy its $25 feasibility report.
settings.deleteBlurb: Permanently removes your conversations, uploaded files, and sign-in. Purchase records are retained for billing history.
settings.deleteModalBody: This permanently deletes your conversations, uploaded files, and shared links, and cancels any active subscription. This cannot be undone.
